# 2025-11-15 — Saturday

Rain since 5. Stayed in.

Refactored anthropic. Feels lighter now, not necessarily faster.

Rolled back the ruff change. The perf gain wasn't worth the flakiness.

Mum called. She is fine. Father is fine. The dog is fine.

Ran into Jakub at Serra da Estrela. First time in months. Agreed to dinner next week; we'll see.

Good review is mostly reading slowly. The rest is taste.

A test that was hard to write is a test I trust.
